name: WF14 — 90-Day War Plan: Weekly Preview Email

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "Generate the HTML body for a weekly preview email for Akinwunmi's 90-Day War Plan.

Rules:
- Write as a strategic coach preparing a soldier for the week
- Open with a forward-looking scripture or quote
- Be specific about NT assignments (name the books)
- Tie career actions to the revenue phase target
- Include YouTube pipeline reminder (3 videos/day target)
- Close with urgency — every week counts in a 90-day run
- Output clean HTML fragments (no <html>/<head>/<body> tags)
- Use inline styles only. Colors: prayer=#f59e0b, NT=#22c55e, book=#a855f7, code=#3b82f6, career=#ef4444, YouTube=#ea580c
- Font: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif
- Text color: #e2e8f0 on dark background #07090c
- Include a table for the NT reading schedule
- 300-500 words"
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Coming week: {{ $json.week_num }} ({{ $json.date_range }})
Revenue Phase: {{ $json.phase }} (target: ${{ $json.weekly_target }}/wk)
Cumulative revenue: ${{ $json.total_revenue }} of $100K goal
Days remaining: {{ $json.days_remaining }} of 90

NT reading schedule:
{{ $json.nt_schedule }}

Phase {{ $json.phase }} career actions:
{{ $json.career_actions }}

Cumulative: {{ $json.total_proposals }} proposals, {{ $json.total_videos }} videos, {{ $json.total_book_pages }} pages, {{ $json.total_code_hrs }} code hrs"
    }
  ],
  "max_tokens": 1500,
  "temperature": 0.7
}
